attributes.action: I want government to reduce fuel duty to help people during Iran war
attributes.additional_details: It’s about time the government started to help citizens in the united kingdom start by putting us first instead of giving away billions to other countries
attributes.background: With the cost of living climbing higher due current conflict in Middle East fuel,food prices been higher government should intervene and help United Kingdom out I believe we should not be so reliant on other countries for our oil and start drilling in the north sea

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

Reduce fuel duty and remove VAT on petrol and diesel
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764175
